title: lecanopteris pumila
intro: Lecanopteris pumila is a species of flowering plant in the Polypodiaceae family, commonly known as the dwarf tree fern or dwarf lecanopteris, native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lecanopteris pumila are said to include lowering blood pressure, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Lecanopteris pumila is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a paste or tincture.
